data.title: Hagerty Shareholders Approve Directors, Pay and Auditor
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

Hagerty Inc Class A ( (HGTY) ) just unveiled an update.

At its June 9, 2026 annual meeting, Hagerty, Inc. stockholders voted on a slate of corporate governance matters, including the election of directors and advisory resolutions on executive pay and its review cadence. The company, a specialist in insurance and services for classic car enthusiasts, also sought shareholder ratification of its external auditor for the current fiscal year.

Shareholders elected nine directors, including Chief Executive McKeel Hagerty, to one-year terms ending at the 2027 annual meeting, signaling confidence in the current board composition. Investors also backed the existing executive compensation program, recommended that say-on-pay votes continue on an annual basis, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as Hagerty’s independent registered public accounting firm for the year ending December 31, 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (HGTY) stock is a Buy
with a $14.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hagerty Inc Class A stock,
see the HGTY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HGTY is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial quality (profitable since 2022 with consistently positive cash generation and a strengthened balance sheet) and a constructive earnings-call outlook (reaffirmed guidance with strong premium and EBITDA momentum). These positives are tempered by weak technicals (price below key moving averages and negative MACD) and unfavorable valuation signals in the provided data (negative P/E and no dividend yield provided).

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Issues June 2026 Portfolio Update
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

The latest announcement is out from ARMOUR Residential REIT ( (ARR) ).

On June 12, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT released a June 2026 update detailing its portfolio and capital structure as of May 31, 2026, with CPR data as of June 4, 2026, showing a $22.2 billion portfolio heavily concentrated in agency mortgage‑backed securities, notably 30‑year fixed‑rate pools, and a modest allocation to U.S. Treasury positions and TBA exposures. The company reported a debt‑to‑equity ratio of 7.9, implied leverage of 8.0, liquidity of about $1.16 billion equal to 46% of total capital, significant reliance on repurchase financing from affiliate BUCKLER Securities, and a June 2026 monthly dividend of $0.24 per common share implying a 16.8% yield, underscoring its high‑leverage, high‑yield profile and extensive interest‑rate hedging via $15.3 billion notional in swaps.

ARMOUR’s June 2026 update highlights its heavy concentration in agency MBS and 30‑year fixed pools, with a total portfolio around $22.2 billion and small TBA and Treasury positions. The REIT also emphasizes high leverage and liquidity, significant repo funding from BUCKLER, and a rich 16.8% dividend yield supported by a large interest‑rate swaps book.

ARMOUR’s portfolio data for May 2026 indicate a $22.2 billion book dominated by agency MBS, especially 30‑year fixed‑rate conventional pools, plus limited TBA and Treasury exposure. Key metrics show high leverage, substantial liquidity as a share of capital, and continued emphasis on a high‑yield monthly dividend, reflecting a strategy geared toward income generation underpinned by active hedging and repo financing from multiple counterparties including BUCKLER.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARR) stock is a Hold
with a $18.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARMOUR Residential REIT stock,
see the ARR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARR is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by a mixed financial profile: improved TTM profitability and positive cash flow are offset by a steep revenue decline and high leverage risk. Technical signals are mostly neutral, while valuation is supported by a very high dividend yield but tempered by earnings volatility (negative P/E) and recent book value pressure highlighted in company disclosures.

To see Spark’s full report on ARR stock,
click here.

More about ARMOUR Residential REIT

ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. is a mortgage real estate investment trust that channels private capital into U.S. mortgage markets to support home ownership across a broad borrower base. The company focuses on creating shareholder value by managing a leveraged, diversified portfolio of mortgage‑backed securities issued or guaranteed by U.S. government‑sponsored entities, using experienced management, hedging and liquidity strategies to moderate rate and price risk while prioritizing sustainable dividends.

data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

Zeo ScientifiX ( (ZEOX) ) has shared an update.

On June 10, 2026, Zeo ScientifiX granted fully vested stock options for 625,000 shares each to principal stockholder and consultant Greyt Ventures LLC, CEO and CFO Ian Bothwell, and Chief Medical Officer George Shapiro, all exercisable on a cashless basis over ten years at $1.67 per share. The company also granted 625,000 performance-based incentive options each to the same three parties with anti-dilution provisions tied to future large equity issuances, and awarded a separate fully vested option for 80,000 shares to non-executive director Chuck Bretz with a five-year term, collectively reinforcing long-term alignment between leadership and shareholders while potentially affecting future share structure.

These grants centralize substantial equity incentives among key insiders, including a principal stockholder and senior executives, which may influence governance dynamics and the company’s capital structure over time. The anti-dilutive terms attached to the performance-based options could limit the dilutive impact of future large share issuances on these option holders, shaping how Zeo ScientifiX structures subsequent financing or strategic transactions involving significant new equity.

More about Zeo ScientifiX

Zeo ScientifiX operates in the financial markets as a publicly traded company issuing common stock under its 2021 Incentive Stock Plan. The firm appears to rely on equity-based compensation to align the interests of principal stockholders, executives, and directors with those of shareholders, using stock options as a key element of its incentive structure.

data.title: SPAC Terminates ReserveOne Deal, Plans Velos Rebranding
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. Class A ( (MBAV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On June 12, 2026, M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. and digital asset-focused ReserveOne, Inc. mutually terminated their July 2025 business combination agreement after a significant shift in market conditions for digital assets, leading to the cancellation of a shareholder meeting that had been scheduled to approve the merger. The termination also voided related PIPE and convertible note subscription agreements and prompted the parties to seek withdrawal of an effective merger registration statement.

To reposition the SPAC and extend its deal-making runway, the sponsor agreed on June 12, 2026 to sell 4,279,279 converted Class A founder shares to new investors for about $14.25 million, with part of the proceeds earmarked for loans of up to $4 million to cover accrued expenses. The company plans a shareholder vote to extend its merger deadline to August 2, 2027, permit limited trust interest withdrawals, change its name to Velos Acquisition I Corp., and ease certain governance requirements, while securing non-redemption and voting agreements to keep up to 16 million Class A shares in place and transfer up to 8 million private placement warrants as incentives.

More about M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. Class A

M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) listed on Nasdaq that focuses on identifying and merging with operating businesses, including targets in the digital asset sector. The vehicle raises capital through an initial public offering and holds funds in trust while it searches for a suitable business combination, operating within the broader alternative capital and blank-check company market.

Average Trading Volume: 73,174

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $387.4M

data.title: Almonty Industries Closes Oversubscribed US$800 Million Convertible Notes to Fund Tungsten Expansion
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Almonty Industries ( (TSE:AII) ) just unveiled an update.

On June 9, 2026, Almonty Industries Inc. closed a significantly oversubscribed US$800 million offering of 2.25% convertible senior notes due 2031, including the full US$100 million over-allotment exercised by initial purchasers. The private Rule 144A placement generated net proceeds of approximately US$772.7 million, with about US$83 million allocated to capped call transactions designed to limit dilution from potential note conversions.

The remaining funds are earmarked for working capital and general corporate purposes, including potential acquisitions, giving Almonty a substantially stronger balance sheet. Management said the financing underpins development of the Sangdong Mine and supports the company’s push to emerge as a leading non-China supplier of strategic tungsten to Western defense and advanced technology customers, a positioning that could be increasingly important amid heightened geopolitical and supply-chain tensions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AII) stock is a Buy
with a C$25.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Almonty Industries stock,
see the TSE:AII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AII is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak profitability and ongoing cash burn despite improved revenue growth and gross margin. Technicals are mixed (near-term weakness but longer-term trend support), while valuation is constrained by loss-making earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on AII stock,
click here.

More about Almonty Industries

Almonty Industries Inc. is a multinational tungsten producer focused on supplying conflict-free material to defense and advanced technology sectors in Western markets. Its flagship Sangdong Mine in South Korea, historically one of the world’s largest and highest-grade tungsten deposits, anchors a portfolio that also includes operations in Portugal and projects in the U.S. and Spain.

Positioned as a key non-China source of this strategic metal amid tightening export controls and defense-related procurement bans, Almonty aims to reinforce supply-chain security for the United States and its allies. The company targets growing demand for tungsten used in armor, munitions, and electronics, leveraging its assets to address critical vulnerabilities in Western industrial and military supply lines.

Average Trading Volume: 887,051

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$6.75B

Shareholders also approved the 2017 Stock Plan and ratified Ernst & Young LLP as Angi’s independent registered public accounting firm for the 2026 fiscal year, signaling investor support for the company’s compensation framework and financial oversight structures.

data.title: La Rosa Faces Nasdaq Compliance and Equity Deficiency Challenges
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

La Rosa Holdings Corp. ( (LRHC) ) has provided an announcement.

La Rosa Holdings Corp. reported that on May 21, 2026 it was notified by Nasdaq that it was out of compliance with listing rules due to delinquent filings of its Form 10-K for 2025 and Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. After the company filed its Form 10-K on June 4, 2026, Nasdaq informed La Rosa on June 10, 2026 that it had regained compliance regarding the annual report, but it remains noncompliant because the Form 10-Q is still outstanding.

On June 11, 2026, La Rosa submitted a compliance plan to Nasdaq, which may grant up to October 12, 2026 for the company to regain full filing compliance, and the company said it intends to file the Form 10-Q as soon as practicable. Also on June 10, 2026, Nasdaq notified La Rosa that its negative stockholders’ equity of $(1,848,252) as of December 31, 2025 put it below the $2.5 million minimum required, triggering a separate deficiency notice; the company has until July 27, 2026 to submit a remediation plan and potentially until December 7, 2026 to restore equity levels, while evaluating options to address the shortfall and avoid a possible delisting.

Spark’s Take on LRHC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LRHC is a Neutral.

LRHC scores low primarily due to weak financial performance (widening losses, persistent negative cash flow, and negative equity) and bearish technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events add uncertainty from Nasdaq filing deficiencies and going-concern/internal-control issues, while valuation metrics provided are not informative (P/E 0.00; no dividend yield).

To see Spark’s full report on LRHC stock,
click here.

More about La Rosa Holdings Corp.

La Rosa Holdings Corp. is a Nevada-based company whose common stock trades on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol “LRHC.” The company is subject to Nasdaq’s continued listing requirements, including timely filing of periodic reports with the SEC and maintaining minimum stockholders’ equity thresholds for its listing status.

Average Trading Volume: 712,846

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.54M

data.title: Athena Technology Extends Business Combination Deadline into 2027
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

The latest update is out from Athena Technology Acquisition Corp II Class A ( (ATEK) ).

On June 11, 2026, Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II stockholders approved an amendment to extend the deadline to complete a business combination from June 14, 2026 to as late as March 14, 2027, via up to nine one‑month extensions funded by deposits from its sponsor into the trust account. The same day, 99.75% of eligible Class A shares were represented at the virtual meeting, the extension proposal passed unanimously, redemptions totaled 11,313 shares for about $138,565, and on June 12, 2026 the company deposited $271.48 to trigger the first one‑month extension to July 14, 2026, providing more time to secure a suitable deal while modestly reducing trust funds.

MainPoint1: Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II obtained stockholder approval on June 11, 2026 to extend its business combination deadline from June 14, 2026 to as late as March 14, 2027 through up to nine sponsor-funded monthly extensions.

MainPoint2: At the virtual meeting, the extension passed unanimously with high turnout, a small number of investors redeemed shares for about $138,565, and the company funded the first extension to July 14, 2026, slightly trimming its trust account while gaining more deal time.

More about Athena Technology Acquisition Corp II Class A

Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II is a special purpose acquisition company that raised capital through an initial public offering of Class A common stock and warrants. The company’s primary objective is to identify and consummate a business combination, using a trust account structure that allows public stockholders to redeem shares for cash if they choose not to participate in a proposed deal.

Average Trading Volume: 100

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $93.67M

data.title: Atara Biotherapeutics Adds Independent Director to Board
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Atara Biotherapeutics ( (ATRA) ) has shared an announcement.

On June 11, 2026, Atara Biotherapeutics appointed Brian Cherry as a Class I independent director and member of its Audit Committee, granting him 24,000 restricted stock units vesting over three years and standard non-employee director compensation. The company also executed its standard indemnification agreement with Cherry, underscoring its adherence to governance and board independence practices.

Atara held its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders on June 9, 2026, where shareholders re-elected AnhCo Nguyen and Nachi Subramanian as directors through the 2029 meeting and approved, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers. Investors also approved an increase of 400,000 shares under the 2024 Equity Incentive Plan and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year, signaling continued support for Atara’s governance and equity-based compensation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (ATRA) stock is a Hold
with a $10.00 price target.

data.title: Sponsor Converts Class B Shares to Class A
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Translational Development Acquisition Corp. ( (TDAC) ) just unveiled an update.

On June 12, 2026, Translational Development Acquisition Corp. converted 4,657,499 Class B ordinary shares held by its sponsor, TDAC Partners LLC, into an equal number of Class A ordinary shares, bringing the total Class A shares outstanding to 21,907,499 and leaving one Class B share outstanding. The newly issued Class A shares carry the same restrictions as the former Class B shares, and the transaction generated no cash for the company, did not alter the funds in its trust account, and left the per-share redemption value for public shareholders unchanged at approximately $10.69 per share as of June 12, 2026.

More about Translational Development Acquisition Corp.

Translational Development Acquisition Corp. is a Cayman Islands exempted company structured as a special purpose acquisition company, or SPAC, formed to pursue an initial business combination. The company focuses on raising capital through an initial public offering and holding funds in a trust account until it identifies and completes a suitable merger or acquisition target.

Average Trading Volume: 136,396

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $234.8M

data.title: Avista Pauses Data Center Talks Amid Grid Concerns
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

An update from Avista ( (AVA) ) is now available.

On June 12, 2026, Avista announced it has paused processing energy service negotiations for a proposed 500 MW data center, citing the need for a broader, coordinated planning process with government agencies and stakeholders amid heightened community concern. The move underscores the growing strain that large-scale data center projects place on regional grids and signals Avista’s intention to balance economic development with customer protection, system reliability and regulatory oversight, as it works with local leaders to shape how future large-load requests are evaluated.

Avista emphasized that existing customers will not bear the costs of serving any new large customer, that reliability-driven engineering studies and upgrades are mandatory before service, and that any eventual agreement would require regulatory approval. By framing the pause around transparency, community engagement and responsible growth, the company is positioning itself to manage escalating data center demand while maintaining public trust and aligning with broader regional priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVA) stock is a Hold
with a $42.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avista stock,
see the AVA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AVA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVA is a Neutral.

AVA scores in the mid-range driven primarily by stable financial performance typical of a regulated utility, but constrained by leverage and historically volatile free cash flow alongside softened revenue trends. Valuation is a support (moderate P/E and strong dividend yield), while technical signals are neutral-to-soft and the earnings outlook is balanced by ERM, regulatory, and financing/capex execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on AVA stock,
click here.

More about Avista

Avista Corp. is a regulated energy company engaged in the production, transmission and distribution of electricity and natural gas, along with other energy-related businesses. Through Avista Utilities, it serves 429,000 electric and 386,000 natural gas customers across eastern Washington, northern Idaho and parts of southern and eastern Oregon, and also provides electric service in Juneau, Alaska, via a subsidiary.

data.title: Genasys Secures High-Interest Term Loan for Liquidity
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Genasys ( (GNSS) ) has provided an update.

On June 9, 2026, Genasys Inc. entered into and closed an unsecured term loan agreement with Maran Partners Fund, LP, securing $4.3 million in financing to be used solely for working capital and general corporate purposes. The loan carries an 18% annual interest rate, matures on September 14, 2026, and requires monthly interest payments, with an origination fee of $301,000 deducted at closing and an additional exit fee ranging from $64,500 to $150,500 depending on the repayment date.

The agreement includes customary representations, warranties, and restrictive covenants that limit Genasys from certain distributions, new indebtedness, asset sales, redemptions, and fundamental changes, and it mandates prepayment upon events such as a change of control, significant non-ordinary-course asset sales, or certain equity issuances. While Genasys may prepay the loan without penalty in $250,000 increments with 30 days’ notice, the high fixed interest rate and tight covenants underscore both the company’s near-term liquidity needs and the lender’s emphasis on control and downside protection, factors that may influence Genasys’s financial flexibility and strategic options through the September 2026 maturity.

The most recent analyst rating on (GNSS) stock is a Buy
with a $6.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Genasys stock,
see the GNSS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GNSS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GNSS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial resilience (thin equity vs. debt and still-negative TTM cash flow) and a bearish technical setup (trading below major moving averages). The latest earnings call adds support due to a return to GAAP profitability, strong margins, and a sizable backlog with positive FY26 profitability guidance, but liquidity and receivable-collection concentration risks remain significant. Valuation is mid-range with a ~28.5 P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GNSS stock,
click here.

More about Genasys

Genasys Inc. is a Delaware-based company that operates in the technology and communications sector, though the release focuses primarily on its corporate financing activities rather than detailing specific products, services, or markets. The company appears to rely on structured credit arrangements to support its working capital and general corporate needs, indicating ongoing funding requirements to sustain operations and strategic initiatives.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $86.99M
